title: goniopteris schaffneri
intro: Goniopteris schaffneri, also known as Schaffner's fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae, native to Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goniopteris schaffneri include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
